description: List of monetary figures in Arabic from one Ibrāhīm Malikī in which one of the entries on the verso mentions the year 1256 AH and the date 7 Muharram, which is 1840 CE. On both the recto and verso the symbol for silver kuruş appears throughout as "ق". The heading on the verso uses the verb "وصل" which suggests payments made but it is unclear whether Ibrāhīm Malikī receiving or making the payments described. MCD.
